events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. This is a clear critical-risk failure: excavation proceeding without an 811 locate ticket, no visible utility marks/flags, and no tolerance-zone hand-digging evidence — a direct violation of CGA/one-call damage-prevention practice with high potential for utility strikes (gas, electric, communications). Work must stop until a valid locate ticket is obtained and marks are confirmed.
